(Google it.)  

If you love ‘em big, bold, and certainly NOT-FOR-THE-SHY…you’re gonna want some. At over $80 off, with 94 POINTS, and savings of a solid 67+%...I mean, how could you not????

While it lasts!!! 

** Don’t confuse this “Collinetta” with a vineyard of the same name in Coombsville – the name means “little hill,” and this EASTERN Oakville hillside sourcing includes two heavy-hitters of Napa’s priciest AVA… whose real names are fiercely protected by an iron-clad series of NDAs. **

title: Tenuta Ghiaccio Forte Morellino di Scansano 2024
body_html:
“The Tenuta Ghiaccio Forte 2024 Morellino di Scansano Ghiaccio Forte captures the zeitgeist of the moment with its ruby transparency and immediate drinking charm. Short maceration times of seven to eight days give the wine a light and punchy feel with weightless intensity...” – Robert Parker’s The Wine Advocate

93 POINTS! Way, way UNDER $20, and the absolute BEST PRICE in the world! Yes! This stunning project from the cult-worthy Montalcino mavens at CASTELLO DI ROMITORIO is a vibe – and the moment is here to embrace the rise of Morellino!!! 

Tenuta Ghiaccio Forte bringing the GLUTTONY to this Fat Tuesday! The “Fortress Under The Stars” estate in Maremma, along the southern coast of Tuscany, has me SHOOK, y’all! I tasted this last fall, at the simply STUNNING Castello di Romitorio estate in Montalcino – but when they told me about their ancient Etruscan fort, atop a solitary hill, surrounded by forest and rivers, only 10 miles from the Tyrrhenian Sea – I knew I had just added a stop on my next Italy trip. The Sangiovese vines make up 11 hectares of the 100-hectare estate – with 25-year-old vines planted with utterly TOP-NOTCH clones taken from Montevertine, Biondi-Santi, and Il Poggione!!! I mean, C’MON!!! 

It’s fresh, and bright, and simply bubbling with zippy and tart red fruits, crushed blueberries, and wild herbs, and this volcanic minerality that really makes everything POP! It’s complex – but absolutely CRUSHABLE…and we even suggest serving this with a slight chill. If you love classic Tuscany, but also love the high-toned vibrancy of an Etna Rosso – congratulations!!! You just found your new house wine. It’s fun, and intense, light, and feverishly spicy – just an EPIC bottle of cannot-get-enough goodness through and through! Read the reviews, but grab a case first and foremost – ‘cause once this is gone, it is gone for good! 

The PRICE! 93 points and just ridiculously good…while it lasts!!!

title: Beaulieu Vineyards BV Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley 2022
body_html:
And...GONE!!! Fare thee well, Bordeaux. And HELLO, Napa!!! 92 POINT Napa Cab for the win! BV’s unbelievable consistency, and quality, and value...all wrapped up in this delectable bottling that we scored at the world’s BEST PRICE!

We’re raising a glass of one of Napa’s best value Cabernets — and if there is one tried and true maxim here in Napa...it's always bet on BV!

For more than 100 years, Beaulieu Vineyard has stood as an icon of the Napa Valley…and the GOAT is in the house, today!!!! The single-most historic, trend-setting, game-changing winery in Napa Valley...BAR NONE! 92 POINTS! UNDER $25 is your Last Bottle price...say WHAT?!?! Sorry, but — it is SURREAL to have this BV cab at the best price ANYWHERE! Yup, put a stick in us and turn us over, we’re DUNZO!! Toss in 100 point winemaker Trevor Durling, who is only the FIFTH winemaker in the nearly 120 years of BV — and you have a recipe for something special.

81% Cabernet Sauvignon, 7% Syrah, 5% Malbec, 3% Petite Sirah, 2% Merlot, and 2% Petit Verdot...this is a veritable tapestry of vinous perfection. Deep and rich with red strawberries, cherries, black currants, and blackberry notes, followed by roasted fennel, captivating rosemary and thyme, with warm mocha and spiced oak roundness…WOW! This just SOARS with polish and decadence, in a friendly, drink-me-young, drink-me-often sort of style. Seriously outperforms plenty of Napa Cabs at well over TWICE the price — so to have this at the WORLD’S BEST PRICE is an absolute coup!

Go get some, friends!

title: Cupano Sant' Antimo Ombrone Tuscany 2021
body_html:
Super Tuscan Sunday Funday, INDEED! I had a premonition that we’d sell out, so we planned ahead and backed this up with the impressively youthful, 96 POINT, 2021 vintage of Cupano’s Ombrone!!! Same KILLER price – but even less to share!

Whatever are you waiting for?!?! You most certainly don’t want to miss this twice – and hey, if you’re lucky and fast-twitchy enough to have scored the 2019 vintage, do you ever have an amazing night of side-by-side comparisons in your future! Talk about a win-win! The critics call this a “masterful creation” and you better believe it, good people! 

“The Architect of Italian Wine” Carlo Ferrini guided Lionel and Ornella in planting this pristine property, and then famed French biodynamics expert François Bouchet taught them how to farm it…and as if that weren’t already a MASSIVE kickstart for any rising star estate, the ICONIC Henri Jayer – one of the single most important and innovative Burgundy winemakers of ALL-TIME – taught Lionel everything he knew about winemaking. That’s the sort of pedigree that is simply unmatched, and the quality of this exceptional bottling showcases this like you wouldn’t believe!!!

Beguiling aromas of cherry compote and zesty blood orange, with a mineral, almost sanguine twinge, filled with fanciful fruit and floral elements like black currants, and roasted plums, cigar smoke, and porcini mushrooms, atop wet terracotta clay. It’s IMMENSE and structured, but unimaginably silky, and drives onward with the persistence of a champion. It’s bold, and decidedly youthful – but nevertheless, a good swirl and 30 minutes in the decanter brings this baddie absolutely ROARING to life! I’m grabbing a couple to lay down – as I can’t wait to see what this will bring in another 7 or 8 years’ time. Over $80 OFF on one of Tuscany’s top estates – this is a Super Tuscan to savor…while it lasts, at least!!!

Happy Sunday!

title: Cupano Ombrone Sant'Antimo Tuscany 2019
body_html:
Super Tuscan Sunday Funday! Dropping into the Last Bottle line-up rocking 94 POINTS – let’s return to the simply GLORIOUS Cupano estate, shall we? At a stellar $81 OFF?!

Yeehaw! Who could say no to CABERNET SAUVIGNON, supplemented with 23% Merlot and 20% Cabernet Franc – all biodynamically farmed on a pristine little hamlet just outside of the ancient village of Camigliano? And the PRICE?! Let’s go!!

CUPANO coming back for the encore, good people! If you snagged some of that 97-point Brunello we featured a little ways back – you’d be sage and savvy to complete the set! This rough and tumble Ombrone is every bit as delicious as its kin – but perhaps even more integrated and ready to drink in the here and now! That’s a good thing, people…’cause one whiff in and I’m already planning to open up a second bottle – this is a wine that begs…no, DEMANDS to be shared! Only the worthy need apply – but to those lucky few, what a journey that awaits!

Iron and asphalt, with dark Morello cherries, and blackberries, with roasted plums, and savory, smoky herbs a’plenty, mocha dust, and toasted black peppercorns…this is a BEAST! Things brighten considerably once the juice hits the tongue, with blueberries and raspberries, some mulberry jam, and this zesty blood orange peel note. Balsamic and fresh in equal measure, with the sort of substance, depth, and complexity to impress the most hardcore Bordeaux lovers…just, WOW! The flavors and profound decadence hangs around endlessly, and each and every sip seems to stretch out for minutes at a time. 2019 was one of the most impressive Tuscan vintages in recent memory – and this striking and mesmerizing Super-Tuscan embodies all that PERFECTLY!

Crafted by Andrea Polidoro – a recent “Vinous Icon” – and long-serving winemaker for this remarkable Montalcino estate. Over a sushi dinner in Napa a few months back, Andrea told us how he had been on the press side of the wine biz, rating wines and interviewing vintners from France to Italy, for years. Then, by chance, he tasted Lionel Cousin’s relatively UNKNOWN Cupano wines and fell deeply, madly, in love. He consistently found himself rating them step-in-line with SASSICAIA in blind tastings, which is no easy feat, mind you. So Andrea abandoned his career in Bordeaux and went to work and learn everything he could under Lionel – soaking it all up like a sponge. But HOLD UP…it gets even better! 

Now, Lionel was a filmmaker by trade, but that didn’t stop him from learning how to make wine under one of the greatest…Burgundy…winemakers…EVER! The simply LEGENDARY Henri Jayer was Lionel’s family friend, and he mentored him for several years once Lionel and his wife Ornella, bought this stunning little hamlet in Montalcino back in the mid-90s. After making the wines for the first 15 years – and gaining as much respect as a French winemaker in Montalcino could ever hope for – Lionel passed the reins to his understudy Andrea in 2014 – while still keeping a close watch on his progress. Now having tried several recent vintages across the portfolio – it’s apparent Andrea has been a fine student, and Cupano is crafting some of the best wines in its history! You saw the whole $81 OFF part, right? Ok, then! Barely enough for a Saturday…but maybe…MAYBE…we’ll pull out a surprise a bit later on…

title: Champagne Sleeper Brut Grand Cru NV
body_html:
SLEEPER! The in-house brand that delivers out-of-this-world deals, dropping our first-ever GRAND CRU CHAMPAGNE! Like, proper Champagne...from Champagne, Champagne...and not just any old spot, either...the hallowed chalk soils of Le Mesnil-sur-Oger!!! 

Grand Cru, Côte des Blancs, Le Mesnil-sur-Oger, 100% Chardonnay, aged in bottle for a full 48 months,  Say WHAT?!?! Bubble Monsters the world over – get ready to lose your minds!!! We worked out a deal – a TOP SECRET deal – with one of our favorite Champagne producers. We promised – via a sacred oath ceremony consecrated over copious bottles of Champagne – to never reveal their name, and if you know ANYTHING about Sleeper…we’re the Fort Knox of secrets. This bottling would normally fetch $120 at retail – pretty much the going rate for top-notch, small-production, family-owned and operated Grand Cru Champagne from Le Mesnil. But under your Last Bottle EXCLUSIVE Sleeper label? How’s UNDER $50 sound?!?! Simply INCONCIEVABLE!!!

What’s it like, you say? Um…CLASSIC!!! Le Mesnil is my tried-n-true pick for the most expressive, identifiable terroir in all of Champagne. Bubbles from this ancient seafloor, chalk and limestone riddled site just taste like…Le Mesnil – and whether it is a $1,000+ bottle of Krug Clos du Mesnil or this Under $50 Sleeper Cellars Grand Cru Champagne – you can find the same characteristics of laser-like, precisely focused orchard fruit, and creamy yet zippy minerality that reverberates across the entire range of bottles from this hallowed ground. This extraordinary bottle bursts with yellow apples, and golden plums, uplifted by floral elements of mandarin blossoms and acacia flowers. A light nuttiness of raw almond slivers, with a vein of chalky, seashell minerality that gives this both structure and finish. It’s round throughout, but gorgeously clean and focused on the finish, making this an easy bottle for finishing off in record time. 

The family behind this is technically a Négociant Manipulant – as they don’t own all of the land they farm – but every plot they work with is under long-term contracts, and they oversee the farming of each and every vine that makes it into their program. As such, they are growers in the truest sense of the word, and the attention and care are evident in each and every delectable sip!!! We got all they would sell us – and now the chance is yours.

GRAND CRU LE MESNIL! Grab the ultimate Sleeper – while we got some!

title: Soléna Pinot Noir Winemaker's Cuvee Willamette Valley 2024
body_html:
What a day for PINOT NOIR! Alma Rosa is all sold out, but we've got a bit of Oregon brilliance to ease the blow! 94 POINTS! Under $20! The BOLD and viciously powerful Soléna Pinot Noir has returned...and better than ever!

UNDER $20 for a 94-point Willamette Valley WONDER like this? Huh-to-the-ZAH, good people! Dark as a winter’s night, and overflowing with flavor, and depth, and utterly spectacular brilliance, too? Sign…me…UP!!! Soléna continues to hold down the fort as a tried and true Last Bottle favorite, and it seems each and every new bottling we taste creeps up the quality ladder, inch by delicious inch of Oregonian goodness. This boldly beautiful beast is perhaps the very best yet – and we locked in the sort of price that borders on the unbelievable – especially for this small, family-run production, and mostly killer estate fruit from the Yamhill-Carlton region of Oregon’s Willamette Valley. YES!!! 

Darkly lush…and plump…and JUICY – this baby is a veritable berry and cherry BOOM of seemingly epic proportions. Black cherries, and black raspberries, with Marionberries, and even some tart and sweet huckleberries…YOWZA! The spice box comes rushing in with clove, and black tea, and dashes of cinnamon, flecks of iron, and toasty, charred cedar – all brilliantly uplifted with Tahitian vanilla. The structure is buttressed like a Gothic chapel, and the long and winding finish meanders like the Amazon in the late summer. Somehow – against all odds – this is even better, and bolder, and more intricately layered than their brilliant 2023…and y’all pounced all over that little baddie in a nanosecond. We got all we could – but 94 POINT Pinots dropping in at under $20 a bottle tends to disappear on us, pretty quickly…so do not hesitate to fill that cart!

If you LOVE Pinot (doesn’t everybody?), then you simply  MUST get a handful! You’ll thank me come springtime, and the summer, and fall to come! 

While it lasts!

title: Alma Rosa Pinot Noir El Jabali Vineyard Sta. Rita Hills 2021
body_html:
I mean…how do you close out an EPIC day of Central Coast goodness like this?! Hmmmm…with 96 POINT (plus triple 95s) estate-grown, ROCKSTAR made, simply extraordinary 2021 Pinot Noir!!!

ALMA ROSA’s El Jabali in da’ house! Started the day with the vineyard’s delectable 95-point Chardonnay, so it seems only fitting to bookend this banner Friday with its 96 POINT Pinot Noir brethren! So…here we go! 

The MONUMENTAL 2021 vintage turned out some real bangers in this neck of the proverbial woods – and I’m going to let some other wine folks do the talking for a second…

“The 2021 Pinot Noir El Jabali is superb…This brooding Pinot is quite the knock-out.” – Antonio Galloni

“Just about jumps out of the glass…It's a stunning Pinot Noir to drink over the coming 7-8 years, if not longer.” – Jeb Dunnuck

Yes, in-deed, my friends! The vivacious rose petals, and hyper-charged cherry cola, with blueberries, graphite, and a whisper of delicate lavender and flowering rosemary, too…WOWZA! The velvety texture is just flawless – probably the most polished and silky wine of the day. The wine pushes – never forcefully – just persistently, and carries into this incredibly evocative and memorable note infused with vanilla bean, and cocoa powder, dusted across a mouthful of cherries jubilee. OVER 67% OFF, naturally, and my only wish is that there was more to share. Alright, I am done and dusted…hope you had the most amazing Alma Rosa Day!!!

Do not miss this! And…on a final note…who says Friday the 13th is unlucky???? Not me!

title: Alma Rosa Pinot Noir Rancho La Viña Vineyard Sta. Rita Hills 2022
body_html:
I mean…ANOTHER 95-point Pinot Noir from Alma Rosa? Are these guys good or what?! Single vineyard stunner after single vineyard stunner – now firing off with this impressively rich Rancho La Viña Vineyard!

Take…a…bow, Alma Rosa! One great Chardonnay, three great Pinot Noirs – all gone in record time! We ain’t done yet though, so let’s keep things ROLLING!

Rancho La Viña! It may not be the most creative name for a vineyard – but you have to understand – these folks don’t exactly have a lot of spare time to work on the marketing plan. Not only do they grow some world-class grapes (prized by SAMsARA, Testarossa, Summerland, and more) but they are also the westernmost vineyard in the Santa Rita Hills AVA, growing organic produce and organic walnuts, all on a ranch that has thrived in the region for over 200+ years! 

The vineyard is farmed organically, and the fruit profile is utterly classic S.R.H. – awash with juicy red fruits, like baked strawberries, cranberries, pomegranates, and sweet red cherries. The tannins are grippy and structured, and that tomato leaf character adds another depth of green complexity. This is pure, and crystalline Pinot Noir sexiness – and seems to just now be opening up and starting to strut! 

95 POINTS at the sort of pricing you can scarcely believe! While it lasts, of course!

title: Alma Rosa Pinot Noir La Encantada Vineyard Sta. Rita Hills 2022
body_html:
Can’t stop, won’t stop! 96 POINT La Encantada is here to ROCK…YOUR…WORLD!

Booyeah!!! Over 65% OFF on this righteous gemstone?! Sign me UP! Alma Rosa Founder Richard Sanford (yes, THAT Richard Sanford…) not only planted Santa Barbara’s most iconic vineyard ever with Sanford & Benedict, but he also planted the nearby La Encatada – just seven miles from the Pacific, on the western edge of the Santa Rita Hills. This 250-acre site, planted to over 100 acres of vines is one of the coolest sites in the AVA, and the elegance and wild intensity simply OOOZES with every sip! 

Right out of the bottle, iron and camphor linger on top, but with air a beautiful aromatic bouquet of peonies, violets, with cherry blossoms, and cranberries, orange peels, and a panoply of spices ranging from cinnamon to clove, with a dash of nutmeg and allspice. The spice character holds through a long and delicate finish…and this flat-out SLAYS! The most Sonoma Coast-like of the group, I’d say…but really, really elegant. Another simply STUNNING Pinot that you don’t want to miss!

While it lasts!!!

title: Alma Rosa Pinot Noir Caracol Sta. Rita Hills 2021
body_html:
And sooooo loooong, Chardonnay! But no time for tears, Last Bottlers – ‘cause we are off and running with this 97 POINT single block, estate-grown, Pinot Noir perfection…CARACOL!!!

Who’s ready for PINOT?!?! I know I sure am – especially when it comes from a single block, made in a TINY amount, by a tremendously skilled team (Thomas Rivers Brown protege AND Vinous’ 2020 Winemaker of the year???)...I mean, what more could you ask for?! 

I know…72% OFF!!! On a 97 POINT phenom, and a vineyard – get this, so cool – that is planted in a Fibonacci Spiral!!! (Caracol means “snail”) Sure, it’s probably more for the variation of sun exposure on this sloped anthill of a parcel…but I can’t get help, but get my Dan Brown on here. I’m tasting this, and it ROCKS obviously, but I’m simultaneously looking for clues of the sacred divine on the label, or mentally wandering off into space with equations floating around my head like those “A Beautiful Mind” memes you see on the internet. Wait…was that an albino in my office?

I digress. This relatively new block of the El Jabali estate was planted in 2015, with a massal selection of various clones from across the estate. In just a few short years, this has already become one of the prized parcels on the vineyard – and one sip is enough to tell you why!!! Dried rose petals, and hibiscus aqua fresca, with black cherries, and ripe strawberries, this gorgeous roasted herb and potpourri medley, with pomegranate molasses, and an iron-laden core that makes this powerful, seductive, and endlessly entrancing. And THE PRICE?!?!?!

72% OFF, people! Get some while we got ‘em!

title: Alma Rosa Chardonnay El Jabali Vineyard Sta. Rita Hills 2022
body_html:
All...day...long...with ALMA ROSA! One of the hottest, most collectible names of California’s Central Coast...and we’ve got the goods, today! We kicked off 2026 with a killer deal on their Barrel Select Pinot Noir...but today, good people...TODAY we go even BIGGER!

We’ve got single vineyard GEMS, with crazy high scores, for simply INSANE savings. We’re talking up to 72% OFF, and with FREE SHIPPING on every…single…order – you’re gonna want to grab each and every last bottle of Alma Rosa goodness we have on deck today. We’ll run through these one by one, and as soon as the first sells out, we’ll pop up another…and another…until they are all gone FOREVER! Judging by our one Alma Rosa offer last month – we expect these to FLY so be quick, and better still – make sure you have the new and improved Last Bottle APP, so you get the heads up as soon as the next offer goes LIVE!

Alright – let’s do this!!! We’re starting with a KILLER 95 POINT El Jabali Vineyard Chardonnay – and if you love that PRISTINE coastal balance, where salty-sea breeze freshness meets opulent spice and full-throttle raciness…you better grab some of this STAT! Over 68% OFF means an already irresistible Chardonnay just became impossible to miss! It leads with saltwater taffy and orange blossoms, then lemon meringue, baked pears, cardamom, tangerine oil, and a riotous finale of fresh-baked cinnamon rolls straight outta the oven. It’s a vibe, for certain – but the uplifting acidity and limestone minerality give this a vein of freshness that keeps this singing, and capable of shining brightly for many years yet to come! 

The nearly 630 acre El Jabali Vineyard was planted by the LEGENDARY Richard Sanford, with 5 different micro-vineyards – totalling 40 acres planted – thriving together as Santa Barbara County’s first Certified Organic vineyard. 85% Burgundian varieties, and a smattering of all the best clones, make this one of the most impressive sites in the Santa Rita Hills – and the skilled team here is making some of California’s best at the moment. The price on this simply EPIC Chardonnay is simply too good to show – but once you see it – you’re gonna wanna fill up that cart quick, ‘cause there is simply not enough to share!!! 

More Alma Rosa to come…while it lasts!!!

title: Theorize Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley 2023
body_html:
WOW, that flew out the door.  Don't fret, check out this 94 POINT Theorize Cab from the man himself - Jean Hoefliger!!!

THEORIZE!!! YES!!! The utterly EPIC 2023 vintage, and one gloriously EPIC Napa Cab! 100-point winemaker Jean Hoefliger does his best Godzilla impersonation and absolutely DESTROYS entire city blocks with this plasma-breathing, dinosaur-plated beauty. Pure pleasure in every…single…sip – that perfect balance of crunchy bramble berry fruits, spice-studded cedar, and polished, toasty, soul-fulfilling barrel notes. It’s round, and fresh, big, bold, and velvety smooth – and certainly one of the most approachable, rip-roaring-n-raring-to-go 2023 Napa Cabs we’ve tasted yet!!! 94 POINTS, baby!

There’s a reason The Wine Bible’s Karen MacNeil called Napa’s 2023 harvest “as perfect as any Napa vintage in living memory” and even compared it to the all-time legendary 1961 Bordeaux growing season…it freakin’ ROCKS, people!

Theorize is undoubtedly one of our all-time mega-winners, endlessly requested, utterly colossal Napa Cabernet deal-to-end-all-deals – and when you take amazing fruit, from a world-class winemaker, in a PERFECT vintage…you simply CANNOT miss! Over 67% OFF!!! I can’t think of a better way to continue this fantastic Saturday…so…without further ado.....

Go get some!

title: Dolum Estates Cabernet Sauvignon California 2023
body_html:
94 POINT phenom – from a tried and true Cabernet favorite – at the sort of WAY under $20 price you just can’t ignore!

What a week! Super Bowl, my best gal’s Birthday, EPIC Olympics, Six Nations Rugby, Valentine’s Day (meh), President’s Day holiday…then leading right into Fat Tuesday’s Mardi Gras kick-off…I mean, C’MON!!! All that calls for a celebration, my people – and this FIFTEEN DOLLAR, 94 point, California Cab, at a melon-thumping 75% OFF?!?! Cherry…meet top. 

YES!!!! DOLUM is BACK!!!! These fine folks are perhaps the single greatest new CABERNET producer we’ve found in the last couple of years, dropping hit after hit like Bad Bunny and those weird sugar cane people at the Super Bowl halftime show. Y’all rightly leaped feet first into the deep end when we first dropped this a few months back…and now? Guess who just re-stocked on another TRUCKLOAD??? We did!!! The already iconic, simply PHENOMENAL 2023 vintage is here – and the time is NOW to reload on this all-time Cali-Cab deal! 

Wine wunderkind and mountain specialist Chad Alexander has done it again – inky, hedonistic, rich, and all-out LUSCIOUS Cali-Cab that will no doubt go down in the annals of Last Bottle history as one of the greatest deals of ALL TIME! Fifteen bucks? You can get a watered-down Coors Light at the ballpark for that much! The heady cassis and blackberry perfume! The plush bramble fruits, and plums, with the wild sage and fennel spice, and flecks of crushed gravel and vibrant minerality throughout?! STOP IT! It’s silky smooth, and all kinds of dreamy, with a finish that lingers softly, and leaves you craving just…one…more…SIP! Criminally easy to drink – our little sample bottle was gone in three minutes flat on the tasting bar in the office – and colleagues were pouring this into coffee mugs rather than seek out a wine glass and risking missing out. 

This drinks like a Napa Cab in that $75+ range…easily – but at THIS price? And a full 75% OFF? That’s a 6-pack of scrumdiddly-umptuous Cali-Cab – signed, sealed, and delivered to your front porch for under $100! DO NOT miss out on this simply KILLER deal! 

While it lasts!

title: Penfolds Shiraz St. Henri South Australia 2017
body_html:
PENFOLDS!!! Their 97 POINT St. Henri bottling is the brand’s counterpoint to their flagship “Grange”. All of the prestige, and one of the world’s best expressions of Syrah...minus the new oak influence.

Purists! Aussie lovers! Syrah, and Shiraz enthusiasts the world over – you…are…not…READY! PENFOLDS is here! The Big Cheese, the Top Boss, the big Grand Poobah of Australian wine – and one of the greatest producers in the entire world…HERE! Now! Huzzah! You’ve surely heard of Grange – their flagship Shiraz (usually with a dash of Cab) that has made them the Land Down Under’s First Growth champion. Maybe a handful of you have even tasted it – in all of its lacquered, tongue-staining, spine-tightening glory! Welp, I’m lucky enough to have tasted Grange side-by-side with this bottling of St. Henri…and I can say – without my prototypical ebullious flair or any modicum of hyperbole – I’ll take THIS…every single time! 

It’s not that it is a better wine, per se…just different. Grange is beastly, shellacked with oak influence and a veritable spice-box of unapologetically bold, barrel-driven flavors. It’s delicious – no question – but I LOOOOOOOOOOOVVVVEEE me some Syrah/Shiraz. St. Henri is soooo pure, so wild and unhindered – as evocative as it is mysterious, with TONS of fruit, and plenty of spice – just in more of that wild garrigue and fresh herbs from the garden sort of way. It’s floral, and infused with violets, and cherry kirsch, but also this smoky/beefy/bacon fat savageness that makes for truly EPIC Syrah/Shiraz unforgettable! And hey…97 POINTS is just the cherry on top!!!

50-YEAR-OLD plus large oak casks hold the wine for a mere 12 months – just enough to polish the tannins into a honed and razor-sharp spear of vinous delight! The torrefaction of careful winemaking gives this a fresh-roasted coffee bean aura, with salt-brined black olives tickling your tongue the second it hits the palate. But cool, bright red fruits and a tingly demeanor drive this ever onward, with pomegranates and red currants lingering long after each and every sip – both teasing you and dragging you towards the next eager gulp, until every last drop is done and dusted! It finishes cleaner than a perfect sweep in Olympic curling – and the same heartfelt warmth settles into your soul for just as long. This is vibrantly youthful for coming up on a decade – and another 20+ years are clearly within reach. I don’t think I can wait that long myself – I’m already dreaming of the roasted and braised leg of lamb that I’m going to serve this with over Easter. Under $100 is an absolute steal for what must surely be a TOP 10 Shiraz/Syrah in the entire universe – and with FREE SHIPPING on every order…you’d be wise to get as many as you possibly can, as quickly as you can!

While it lasts!

title: Arrivé Cellars Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley 2023
body_html:
And…GONE! We’re moving on with a look back at a recent release…Arrivé’s straight Napa Cab! OVER 80 % OFF?! With a killer 94 POINTS?! Let’s go!!!

So…anybody here like saving $120+ on a single bottle of EPIC new 94 POINT Napa Cab from a pedigreed and rising star winemaker??? Nah? Not you? Best move along then. As for the REST of you…let’s DO this!

YES!!! Under $30 for THIS?! Great googly-moogly, what a steal! Arrivé’s inaugural release of three impeccable Napa Cabs is creating quite the buzz in this verdant little valley of ours, and that buzz is spreading! A KILLER new project from winemaker Morgan Maureze – who spent a decade and a half working side by side with the one and only Andy Erickson, and can also claim the likes of Domaine de la Romanée-Conti, Château Pétrus, AND Château Haut-Brion on his CV. I mean…WHAT?! He’s also running the show at Seven Apart, after a full six years as head honcho at the cult-y Marciano Estate, and some time at Dominus. So yeah, he knows a thing or two about crafting SLAY-worthy wines. 

62% Saint Helena fruit, 38% Oak Knoll, 100% Cabernet Sauvignon, and absolutely BANGIN’! Juicier and more approachable than the Reserve – this is sexy, polished, and simply pumped and plump with blackberries, red bramble fruits, and gushing plums, all framed with toasty, classy French oak, and flecks of baking spices. Normally $150 at the winery – but we got a one-time-only MEGA-DEAL to bring this your way at ONLY $29!!! That’s over 80% OFF, friends! 

We’ve already sold out of one delectable Cab today – so do what you must, and get as much of this 94 POINT baddie as you possibly can! While it lasts!!!

title: Housley's Century Oak Winery Cabernet Sauvignon Estate Judy's Vineyard Mokelumne River 2021
body_html:
Daily Drinker CAB-ALERT! Seven generations and over four decades of farming – from Napa to Lodi – resulting in a STUNNING 92 POINT, single-vineyard Cali-Cab at one unbeatable price!

Housley’s Century Oak Cab is BACK! Spring cleaning starts early this year – ‘cause y’all are gonna need some serious real estate cleared for LOADING UP on this! Cali-Cab in da house! Cheaper than a slice and a Coke (or some grocery store sushi and a flat white coffee if you live in CA), and just wildly drinkable CALI-CAB from longtime Napa Valley grape growers…YES!!! Ripe, structured, toasty, and polished cabernet sauvignon just perfect to drink NOW, like this morning, and into the night!! What a price we scored!!

I mean…holy SMOKES! Single vineyard cabernet goodness, people! For how much?!?! FOURTEEN DOLLARS, you say?!? Huzzah! This is some prime, luxuriously layered stuff…the INKY blackberry goodness, and powdery cacao, with roasted plums, and dried cherries, with this warm, terracotta clay, and flecks of pencil shavings…WOWZA! Then the sweet pipe tobacco and myriad spice-box notes come to life…and POW! Tastes like something four times the price…EASY! Judy’s Vineyard is JUST JAMMING again! If you scored any of the previous vintages, you are in…for…a…TREAT! The best one I’ve tasted yet, no question. And despite ALL of the madness in the world today (and it is truly madness), we have a simply killer, family-made, thoughtfully crafted, Cali-Cab at the same great price…FOURTEEN DOLLARS! For single-vineyard CABERNET SAUVIGNON, from absolutely ANYWHERE in the Golden State – it’s a steal!

The Housley family has been at this for a while, with Napa vineyards under their (green) thumb for over 40 years. In 2000, they set up Century Oak Winery in the heart of the Mokelumne River AVA, near Lodi. The loamy, alluvial soils are pristine for retaining moisture, allowing vines to thrive for up to a century. When the family purchased the vineyard in 1990, they completely revamped the property, dropping the yields by 40% to increase concentration and flavors. Throw in 18 months aging in all new French oak barrels, and the result is one of the best “daily drinker” Cali-Cabs you’ll find!

While it lasts!

title: Champagne Camille Jacquet Le Mesnil-sur-Oger Brut Grand Cru NV
body_html:
Roll up your sleeves, good people, because we have BUBBLES! 94 POINTS! Grand Cru goodness from the tippy-top sites in the Côte des Blancs – Champagne’s CHARDONNAY wonderland! Oh, ho, ho, is this baby ever DELICIOUS! Woo hoo, what a score today!! A whopping 50% OFF…Let’s GOOOO!

When we snag a GRAND CRU Champers like this, at a price like we have…oh, baby, this is something to be THANKFUL for! 40 acres of vines – spread across the greatest Chardonnay communes of the Côte des Blancs… we’re talking LE MESNIL, Avize, Cramant, Chouilly, Oger, Oiry…YOWZA! All for ONLY $39?! Yes, please!

Camille Jacquet is a recent addition to the heralded house, Maison Jean Pernet, a Champagne icon that has been growing grapes since the 17th century. We are CONSTANTLY on the prowl for kickass bubbly that we can find for no-brainer pricing. We look far and wide. And today....well...today we SCORED! Another HUGE feather in our Champagne cap, straight from France and ready to make your every bubbly wish come true!

Liquid lightning freshness, then some succulent baked apples, crisp pears, and a creamy, rich mouthfeel rolls into a finish of bread dough, croissants and candied lemon peel….it’s fresh as the day is long with a sophisticated joie de vivre that will turn any gathering into the year’s most ROCKING party! My goodness, this drinks like something MUCH pricier! 94 POINTS! At 50% OFF?! Where’s my saber? We’re getting after it, RIGHT NOW! 

While it lasts, folks!

title: Ernesto Catena Pian di Marroni Toscana 2022
body_html:
95 POINTS! The name CATENA immediately makes wine lovers think of Argentina...and Malbec...but not today! 100% Sangiovese, from a single vineyard in the heart of Tuscany, crafted by Ernesto Catena – over $100 OFF and simply “drop-dead gorgeous”!

The Catena family is synonymous with the greatest Malbecs in the world, and Ernesto grew up amongst these vines, the heir to his father Nicolás Catena Zapata’s empire. But his artistic passions and desire to travel the world soon saw him bouncing all over the globe, eventually taking him to the family’s Italian roots. Now, just a few miles east of Florence, he’s growing some roots all his own – and this expressive, concentrated, and incredibly powerful Pian di Marroni puts a new stamp on the great wines of Tuscany.

The name translates to “Chestnut Fields” – an homage to the dense forest in Valdisieve where this vineyard sits at 350 meters above sea level. The production is savagely minuscule – we’re talking about 333 cases made. The fact that any exists outside of Italy (and maybe a handful in Argentina) is in itself a miracle – and we got everything allotted for the entire USA!!! 

Good thing we know a guy in Italy, right?!?! One sip, and you’re gonna be HOOKED – I’m talking Vaudeville act, absolute bombing the stage kind of hooked…and for UNDER $50, you’re gonna wish you could score this on repeat! Black truffles, and dusty cherries, with terracotta clay, and charred rosemary with roasted plums…WOWZA! It’s inky and impressively structured, with a fine, grippy tannin structure that has this clinging to every corner of your mouth. With a bit of air, this gorgeous note of violets and lilacs emerges, with red currants and tart huckleberries, uplifted by spearmint and smoldering sage. The complexity is downright labyrinthian, and immediately had me picturing David Bowie’s Goblin King performing sleight of hand with his crystal ball. That’s a good thing, folks – but not nearly as good as this EPIC price! Normally $150, but we worked out a deal to get every…last…bottle in the USA for the cray-cray low price of just $49!!! For a 95 POINT phenom and a globally-recognized name like Catena – that is simply too good to pass up!

Barely enough made, even less available – so whatever are you waiting for????

While it lasts!

title: Peju Winery Cabernet Sauvignon Limited Release Napa Valley 2023
body_html:
94 POINT PEJU! The KILLER 2023 vintage, a stellar name in the Napa Cab game, all for UNDER $30 a pop! Let’s go! 

We’re spreading the good word of PEJU today – for what may well be the last time in 2025! Y’all know PEJU of course…and based on how you’ve gobbled up every last drop of Peju’s juice we’ve ever featured here on Last Bottle – I’m going to lean out on a limb and say y’all are loving this juice! We first dropped this a few months back – and thanks largely to y’all’s EARTH-SHATTERING response…we convinced the good folks at Peju to let us score the ultimate re-order! And so…Napa’s EPIC 2023 vintage of a LIMITED RELEASE Cabernet Sauvignon – at OVER 70% OFF is back on the board! Flex those fingers people – this could move LIGHTNING fast!

Peju does it again with another CLASSIC Napa Cab that pulses with roses and lilacs, then baked plum tarts, and this spice-box medley of clove, orange peel, cinnamon, and allspice…YES!!! A core of blackberries and black cherries, with the most delectable raspberries, with a kiss of sandalwood, with a rigged backbone of graphite – this…is…PUMPING! Incredibly fresh and youthful, with a never-ending finish! Today, tomorrow, or ten years from now…this is a Napa Cab to revel at!

You saw the whole 94 POINTS, right? And the whole “Over 70% Off, Under $30” thing, too, right? Another trophy for the Peju all-time offer case – while it lasts, of course!

title: Clos Albertus Saint-Georges-Saint-Émilion 2020
body_html:
Guess who’s back? CLOS ALBERTUS and their simply stunning 95 POINT Grand Vin...all for less than $30 a bottle!

Clos Albertus curtain call, ladies and gents! If you scored some of this several months back, you surely SWOONED as I did – and we’ve got JUST enough left to start off a slow Sunday! One of the biggest surprises out of Bordeaux (and most delicious) in all of 2025 for me and the Last Bottle buying team – and now heading to the land of the lost, where mythical, delectable BEASTS go to roam forevermore! The entire estate is less than 4 ACRES – and that 95 POINT review absolutely nails it when calling this 2020 beast “a very impressive showing”! 40% Merlot, 30% Cabernet Sauvignon, and 30% Cabernet Franc – this is everything you might want in a Bordeaux blend…and guaranteed to outpace other big-name Bordeauxs at four times the price! A simply intoxicating bouquet of candied violets and blueberry pastilles, with a hint of crayon wax, lavender, and red currants. Can something smell COOL??? ‘Cause this most certainly does…cooler than Liam Neeson auditioning for the role of a man who’s been wronged and must reluctantly dust off the horrifying and deadly skillset used in his former life. Yeah…THAT cool. Just peep what Master of Wine, Lisa Perrotti-Brown, had to say about this rising star…

“For many years, areas on the peripheries of prestigious Saint-Émilion—known as the satellites—have been considered the poor cousins. But in 2016, a group of eight wineries decided it was time to change that view…The tiny 1.5-hectare estate of Clos Albertus…was a real find for me at this tasting…the potential to take on some of the more famous Saint-Émilion estates in the future is clearly there!” 

I mean, right? RIGHT? Under $30? For THIS?! The flavors are taut, mineral, and intensely concentrated – exceptionally age-worthy and complex like tippy-top 1st Growth Bordeaux – at a price that just defies all logic and expectation! Brilliant now, with a few minutes of ferocious swirling like a madman, but with the ability to age for several decades yet! I cannot stress this enough – this is elegant, powerful, gorgeous, and compelling stuff! 95 POINTS and worth way, way more than a mere TWENTY NINE DOLLARS!!! The 2020 vintage turned out some absolutely STELLAR wines in Saint-Émilion – and the best producers were those who managed the extreme heat and dry conditions of the vintage. Set on the right bank of the Barbanne river, on the uppermost northern edge of the appellation – Clos Albertus is one of the coolest sites in the region…and this beauty has me break-dancing for another sip! Over 50% OFF on an already great steal?! YES!!! 

While it lasts!

title: Domaine de la Janasse Châteauneuf-du-Pape Rouge 2022
body_html:
“Domaine de la Janasse is one of the great winemaking estates of not only France, but of the world." - Robert Parker, Jr.

Welp, when the Grand Poobah of American wine writing, and arguably the most important wine critic in history, makes a statement like that…who am I to argue?!

94 POINT CdP…wooohoooo!!! I’m a shameless, monstrous fanboy of this great Rhone house – basically, I’m that guy who wears the Pearl Jam t-shirt, at the Pearl Jam concert, and then buys another for like $70 just to try and get Eddie Vedder to sign it. That’s me, but for Janasse. Some of my all-time favorite CdPs have been crafted here at this estate – and not just the big scoring 100-pointers either. (Though, those are EPIC, no question.) This “Tradition” is a personal benchmark for simply classic CdP – in monumental vintages and challenging ones, from warm years like 2009, and cool ones like 2022 – I don’t really know what to think about the possibilities of a full CdP vintage until I taste the Sabon family’s work from this workhorse cuvée. As ever…IT RULES!  

The freshness and high-toned intensity of the 2022 vintage stands out for this release – and is likely why every critic seems to talk about the incredible ageability for a cuvée that typically stands as the “DRINK NOW” bottling of their three different CdPs. But with a seductive nose of black fruits, lavender, violets, and plenty of roasted herbs – this elegant seductress is pretty darn enticing right NOW! Mostly Grenache – the Sabons are Grenache MASTERS – and all from plots on the northern plateau of La Crau. These sacred soils imbibe this silky and impressive wine with a finish that borders on sheer bottled JOY! It’s simply impossible to pop less than two bottles at a time…greedy sip after greedy sip makes this disappear lightning quick, and you can just never have enough! 94 POINTS! Fierce, elegant, ripe, precise, focused, and voluminous. A BEAST of the Southern Rhone you’ll LOVE trying to tame! 

One last time, Vive la France!

title: E. Guigal Côtes du Rhône Blanc 2022
body_html:
“If I had a fish restaurant with a patio, I’d pour the sh*t out of this by the glass.” – Alex Mares, Sommelier at *** Michelin’s Eleven Madison Park

So…SUPER SUNDAY continues! We blasted through that first cache of glorious GUIGAL…but what say you to some hyper-delish Côtes du Rhône Blanc? Viognier, Roussanne, Marsanne, Clairette Blanc, Grenache Blanc, and Bourboulenc…all the best Rhône white grapes are here – and man, do they know how to PARTY! Jeb Dunnuck calls this ”outstanding” and “classy” before going on to admit, “I never cease to be amazed at the quality of the Côtes du Rhône white from this team…” HELLO! 

Our entire team was similarly impressed – and when we worked out a deal to bring it your way at a MARVELOUS $12…we backflipped. Stainless steel keeps this sharp and vibrant, cool fermentation makes this more expressive than a mime on ecstasy, and limestone, granite, and sedimentary soils give this class, structure, and complexity for days! It rocks, even if it were THREE TIMES the price…but at our KILLER best in the USA price – this baby SLAYS! Matchstick and beeswax burst from the glass, followed by floral notes of lemon verbena, star jasmine, and honeysuckle. Orange oil, tangerine, honeydew melon, juicy peach, and a kiss of papaya – oh yeah, them too. The golden and glistening wine oozes with warming spices and a rich, mouth-coating texture, making this a perfect winter white with or without food. If you’re wise, you’ll load up the truck on this too – when else can you snag the iconic house of GUIGAL for UNDER $13???

Go get ‘em, good people!

title: E. Guigal Côtes du Rhône Rouge 2020
body_html:
Guigal is a historic Rhône estate – and their wines are nothing short of legendary – even the entry-level bottlings! This quadruple 90 POINT daily drinker sets the bar for UNDER $15 Rhône Reds...and you’re gonna want to back up the truck!

GUIGAL in da’ house! In what must surely be the BIGGEST event in the Bay Area today – Last Bottle is breaking out one of the world’s greatest producers, and showcasing a bottle of brilliance that you’re gonna want a whole MOUNTAIN of…all at the BEST PRICE IN THE USA!

Well, smack my cotton tail and call me Bad Bunny – let’s get this show on the road! You know Guigal, of course…the single GREATEST name of Northern Rhône’s Côte-Rôtie…revered for DECADES for their prized La Mouline, La Landonne, and La Turque, plus a whole heap of other top wines?! They’re the generational stewards of historic vineyards that have been planted for THOUSANDS of years – so you better believe they take every little detail seriously. This utterly delectable Côtes du Rhône Rouge just landed last week at LB HQ, and we thought, since we have sooooo little, and since there is absolutely nothing else of consequence going on today…let’s offer these baddies out at the INCREDIBLE, inconceivable price of just $12!!!

Say WHAT?!?! Oh, yes. 50% Syrah, 40% Grenache, and 10% Mourvèdre…you are not READY!!! High-toned, spicy, and chock-a-block with a teeth-shattering intensity – this is BOLD and definitely not for the shy! Roasted plums pop you on the button straight away, followed by Mediterranean herbs, smoked and savoury meats, and black pepper a’plenty. There’s a plethora of fruit – blackberries, black currants, raspberries, strawberries, black olives, and more – but this is far from fruity. There’s a depth and complexity you rarely find in such value-driven bottlings…and this character falls more in line with the producer’s more highly prized bottlings than you might expect! Chocolate-y, too! I mean, at this PRICE…the sort of quality is as unexpected as it is appreciated! A sleeper and a stunner for sure – and while you are unlikely to confuse it with one of the prized “La Las”, you’ll nevertheless find some impressive similarities! Again…at just TWELVE DOLLARS – I’m not sure how you could say no, honestly. I didn’t…I couldn’t…one case headed home this Super Bowl Sunday! The rest – I leave to you! 

While it lasts!

title: Gary Farrell Pinot Noir Hallberg Vineyard Russian River Valley 2022
body_html:
One Hallberg down…but wait! Gary Farrell’s EPIC 2022 from the same plot is BACK! 94 Point RRV Pinot Noir from the cool Green Valley – at nearly 60% OFF! Pinot-philes rejoice! 

Gary Farrell is a Russian River Valley LEGEND, with over four decades of top Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, and more! Any of y’all that tuned in for our big BLOWOUT of a massive cache of their portfolio we scored back in the summertime already know – this is one of the TOP players in the game out in Sonoma – and I’ve been sipping and savoring these fantastic wines for YEARS! 94 POINTS and way, WAY under $30…don’t you dare miss twice!!! 

Let’s do this! Emeritus, Joseph Jewell, Etude, Vintus, Martin Ray – just a few of California’s biggest and brightest Pinot names that have made killer single-vineyard bottlings from Graton’s famous Hallberg Ranch. The Goldridge loam soils here, and that coastal fog and cooling breeze of the Pacific make this Pinot Noir Shangri-la – it’s almost unimaginable to contemplate that it spent most of the 20th century as an apple orchard! Today, 13 different clones of Pinot Noir reign supreme, and the wines from this site are revered for their intoxicating perfume, surreal complexity, and mouth-watering acidity. This 2022 lives up to all that and a bag of chips – with an incense-like waft of white flowers, and black tea, with vanilla bean, and baking spice all begging me to sip greedily and deep. The flavors of red cherries, and tart little plums, dusty earth, chocolate truffles, and even a little flush of black trumpet mushrooms – just EPIC juice that is classic Green Valley of Russian River through and through. We got every last bottle we could…now it is your turn! 

While it lasts!

title: Gary Farrell Pinot Noir Hallberg Vineyard Russian River Valley 2021
body_html:
“The 2021 Pinot Noir Hallberg Vineyard opens with gorgeous floral aromatics. Bright and punchy, with notable energy, the 2021 marries Russian River exuberance with a good bit of vibrancy.” – Antonio Galloni, 93 points

Don’t make me say it again…but HALLBERG vineyard has quickly become one of my new favorite plots in Russian River for balanced, yet bold, fruity & spiced Pinot Noir that flat out SLAYS! This 2021 vintage delivers like UberEats to a frat house – and when you can score Gary Farrell Pinot Noir – with 93 POINTS and a Last Bottle only price of way UNDER $30…welp, who’s ready for GLORY?!?!

Graton’s famous Hallberg Ranch is just oozing drinkability here…the Goldridge loam soils, and that coastal fog, and the constant, cooling breeze of the Pacific make this Pinot Noir Shangri-la – it’s almost unimaginable to contemplate that it spent most of the 20th century as an apple orchard! Today, 13 different clones of Pinot Noir reign supreme, and the wines from this site are revered for their intoxicating perfume, surreal complexity, and mouth-watering acidity. One delectable sip and…yep…that story checks out!

This is a certified stand-out that easily competes with a whole score of 2021 Sonoma GREATS – at an utterly ludicrous price! Only $26?!?! That’s like two hours of parking in San Francisco! The aromatics here are downright breathtaking – roses and lavender, with whiffs of jasmine and wisteria, then wild and herbal notes of white sage, and peppercorns, with fennel, and spearmint, all elegantly draped around a core of red plums, and tart cherries, with spiced cranberries, orange zest, and…AND! Plush, lush, and unmistakably Green Valley of the Russian River through and through. We got every last bottle we could…now it is your turn!

While it lasts!

title: Champagne Gardet Origine 1895 Brut NV
body_html:
There hasn’t been NEARLY enough bubbly in my life this holiday season...that changes, NOW!!! 94 POINT Champagne – and a Last Bottle EXCLUSIVE – from long-time Last Bottle favorite...Gardet!

What’s the holiday season without copious, soul-satisfying, thirst-quenching BUBBLY? Sounds pretty grinch-y if you ask me! Long-time Last Bottlers (especially local winemakers, cellar hands, and wine-industry peeps) are always begging and pleading for more bubbles – especially when they come in at reality-defying prices like this!  You won’t find this ANYWHERE else in the USA – and with a 94 POINT score, and priced at nearly 50% below what the winery would LIKE us to sell it at…welp, looks like we’ve got another FESTIVUS MIRACLE on our hands!

This 1895 Origine wine hasn't been made for YEARS...but we stumbled upon an old bottle on a recent visit to the idyllic little Champagne hamlet of Chigny-les-Roses and absolutely loved it. We BEGGED the good folks at Gardet to bring it back...and promised to live up to our name and take every...LAST...BOTTLE, should they acquiesce to our request. And...BOOM!!! Luscious, and simply saturated in deliciousness, with creamy and rich opulence that somehow, miraculously, maintains this tart and focused edge of citrus, and ginger – just YUM!!! Freshly baked brioche, and golden plums, with Suncrisp apples, and this floral marzipan note that elevates this all to some godly ambrosial level. Honeysuckle, and tangerines, with this entrancing honeycomb nougat character…it’s captivating!  I always loved these wines…but then I visited their glorious cellar that winds its way for MILES under the rolling hills of Chigny-les-Roses – and now I am certifiably OBSESSED! Is it creamy? Or electrifyingly racy? It’s both, and I simply won’t stop sipping until the bottle is done and dusted!! This little village makes some absolutely stellar Champagne – with some incredibly famous neighbors, including Jay Z’s Armand de Brignac (aka Ace of Spades) and the ICONIC Lasalle family. Gardet’s cellars are legendary – I half expected to encounter the Minotaur – simply packed to the gills with stacks, and crates, and literal WALLS of glorious Champagne!! This beauty is a blend of 45% Pinot Noir, 45% Pinot Meunier, and 10% Chardonnay, all aged slowly for a full 42 months – and at the incredible ONLY @ Last Bottle price – this certified beauty packs a WHALLOP!

Don’t wait, don’t pause, don’t put this off...the bubbly you NEED for 2026 and beyond is HERE...well, for a few hours, perhaps…
Stock up while you can on these beauties – you just never know when you’ll have a Champagne emergency!

And now, for the FEATS OF STRENGTH!

Happy Festivus, you filthy animals.

title: Mystery Cabernet Sauvignon Spring Mountain District Napa Valley 2013
body_html:
96 POINTS! The hallowed 2013 vintage showcases its NEVERENDING power thirteen years in, and we’ve got one heck of a mysterious Napa LEGEND at OVER 78% OFF!

Guess what time it is?! It’s MYSTERY TIME!!! We scored a deal…no, a steal...no, a straight-up ROBBERY! And like Robin Hood of old, we’re sharing the wealth with you, Last Bottlers! In a monumental deal that would tip Friar Tux’s wagon right over – who’s ready to save $141 on KILLER, age-worthy, utterly old-school, Napa Valley goodness?! This offer is BIBLICAL, y’all! I already grabbed a case – and now, NOW...the time is yours!!!

One Cult-worthy Napa Red for UNDER $40???? You all have been gorging yourselves on Elivette like a Sumo champion hits up last call at an all-you-can-eat sushi bar – but this…THIS…just might surpass that crazy deal. A wine that has never…NEVER been discounted before…and we’ve got it for nearly 80% OFF!!! So…who’s ready to lose their minds all over again! Not Newton, not Philip Togni, not Forman, not Mayacamas…but you are getting WARMER!!! A no-nonsense, pioneering vintner/winemaker that was way, WAY ahead of the game when it comes to things like “terroir” and “natural winemaking” here in Napa Valley. He studied with one of Spain’s top winemakers, from one of its most famous families, before working at a LEGENDARY First Growth Bordeaux, and then heading to Napa to train with The Maestro himself, André Tchelistcheff (say what?), and then alongside one of the TOP Napa and Sonoma winemakers at another ICONIC winery. And that was all before he accepted his post at this gem that would make him famous, and hold the top dog spot for nearly 40 years and counting! The estate is one of Napa Valley’s most stunning properties. 500 acres, with 88 acres planted to vine (at least before fire ravaged the property some years back) in an absolutely idyllic bowl where steeply terraced vineyards rise to nearly 2,100 feet above sea level. Farmed by a highly-specialized 7-person crew that has been there for decades, and with a seriously baffling diversity of blocks, and exposures, terraces, and soil-types, clones, old vines, just straight-up MIND-BOGGLING stuff!

And this 2013? Simply JAW-DROPPING – with that signature funk that would make George Clinton himself weak in the knees. Mostly Cabernet Sauvignon, clocking in at over half of the total blend, then rounded out with Merlot, Cabernet Franc, Malbec, and a splash of Petit Verdot. So yes, all FIVE of the traditional Bordeaux grapes, in a mix that is uniquely crafted to shape the identity as the FLAGSHIP of this singular estate and cult-worthy producer. This is a wine not built with critical scores in mind – and perhaps the real achievement is that it secures them all the same. I mean, 96 POINTS, people! It’s dark, and wild, savage, and sumptuous, with dried cherries, and cedar-y woodland duff, then meaty, savory goodness that is spiced with cinnamon, and clove, and cracked leather, molten dark chocolate, and heady, roasted herbs, with a lingering hay smoke character over all. It is such an intriguing and nuanced expression of Napa’s hillsides that you’d be hard pressed to compare it with almost any other Napa Cab today! I mean that in the best possible way, too – this is of a category all its own – and more easily referenced to old-school Bordeaux, or classic Rioja, and even some of the pioneering producers of Hermitage and top-notch Northern Rhône.

You might love it. You might prefer Napa’s more prototypical fruit/oak bombs. But I promise one thing…you will NEVER forget it – AND if you do love it, we’re talking about the sort of love that lasts a lifetime, inspires chart-topping pop songs, and makes struggling paupers with higher-level educations write enduring and classic tales of romance! THAT’S the kind of love I’m talking about! With FREE SHIPPING on every single order – one thing is certain – you simply CANNOT miss it!!!

Get some…while you are ABLE!

title: Château Couhins Grand Vin de Graves Pessac-Léognan Rouge 2020
body_html:
And POOF! We need back-ups, on back-ups today! Dropping south from the Right Bank run we've been on...let's check in on GRAVES, shall we?

94 POINT Bordeaux greatness! A 17th-century estate, reborn into one of Graves’ brightest shining stars!

“I loved the 2020 Château Couhins…” - Jeb Dunnuck

Same, same JD. Alright, soon-to-be-weekend warriors, Château Couhins is BACK! Show of (virtual) hands…who scored some of their BRILLIANT White Bordeaux we featured back in May? Simply electric, right? Welp, faithful Bordeaux lovers, guess who just SCORED their killer GRAND VIN de Graves Rouge?! WE DID! 

Huh-to-the-zah, good people! Under $30, too? Man, the hits just keep coming – like Gaga and MTV VMA nominations – and if you are ready to be blown away by the intensity, the purity, and the flat-out impressive complexity of one of Pessac-Léognan’s BEST…your ship has come in! Hailing from a vineyard that has been prized since the 17th century, this gravelly and rocky parcel of alluvial perfection was elevated to GRAND CRU status in 1959, when it was owned by the same folks behind Château Calon Ségur, and used for the past several decades as a top site for viticultural exploration by France’s National Institute for Agriculture, Food, and Environment Research. They painstakingly mapped out the soils, and re-dug the drainage outlets, and systematically re-planted plot-by-plot over the decades with a careful selection of varieties, clones, and rootstocks – taking careful note of each and every detail imaginable to create a literal fount of information aimed towards keeping Bordeaux at the forefront of quality and innovation in the entire winemaking world!

Now, with a stunning new cellar, visitor center, and state-of-the-art winery – Château Couhins is making some of the finest wines in the region…just…like…THIS! Crazy bright, and vividly fresh – this beauty EXPLODES out of the glass with zippy cherries and currants, floral flourishes of violets and roses, and this warm and soothing sensation of mocha and cinnamon, wrapped up in the heady clutches of iron and salt, and a sort of sanguine meatiness. It’s captivating stuff to be certain – and really just now starting to shine at five years young. The finish is precise and poignant – with a taut intensity that flows silkily across the tongue. 94 POINTS, people! This is only going to get better over the next several years – but my glass drained in NO TIME at all, so you don’t need to wait another minute!

UNDER $30 and a full 62+% OFF makes this a no-brainer…and we’ve got BARELY enough for this back-up, so do not delay!

While it lasts!

title: Eden Rift Pinot Noir Estate Cienega Valley 2021
body_html:
93 POINTS! Over 60% OFF? Take the former CALERA winemaker, a dash of one of California’s most historic vineyards, and you’ve got the makings of an ALL-TIME Last Bottle deal!!!

EDEN RIFT is BACK, good people! Who’s ready for 2021 PINOT NOIR?!?! Rich, lush, and downright SEXY coastal pinot headed up by a winemaker at the very PEAK of his powers…at the sort of pricing you’ll ONLY find here!!! 

Under 14% ABV means you can sip this beauty on the regular – and as good as the 2019 of this gorgeous creature was, and is – the 2021 brings it on like Kirsten Dunst stealing another squad’s cheer routines. Strawberries and rose petals, with this beguiling incense, and bergamot tea note, then flavors of mulberries, and pomegranate, with salted plums, and rosemary shortbread cookies…YOWZA! It’s boisterous, yet delicate, and just perfectly harmonious throughout – a winner that SLAYS at any price…but at our DIZZYING ditty of just $19?!?! 

An ALL-TIME legend through and through! 

Whatever are you waiting for?!?! Grab some while it lasts!!! 

** The Eden Rift Estate is 125 acres in a valley tucked just under a mountain range, a stone’s throw from the Pacific, just outside of Monterey, and right on top of the San Andreas Fault. Mt. Eden, Swan, and Calera heritage clones, as well as some Pommard (clone 4) and a smattering of Dijon clones…this is straight Pinot Shangri La! **

title: Trattore Farms Red Blend Gratitude Dry Creek Valley 2022
body_html:
91 POINTS and just $15!!! Now that is something to be grateful for! We’ve heard your demands...Trattore Farms is back, and this Rhône red is sure to be a new house favorite!!!

The existential dread that is Dry January is well behind us…FINALLY! While I (obviously) abstained from the whole affair on principle – I’ll admit it…I’m hard at work getting many of my friends back in prime drinking shape. (‘Cause that’s what friends do!) As such, I’ll pop a bottle at the slightest indication of interest, or even a pronounced pause of doubt – just to be safe. A crazy delicious, absolutely CRUSHABLE red is a must-have in these dark times (six more weeks of winter…noooooooo!!!), and this GEM fits the bill perfectly!

All estate-grown fruit, and a Rhône-worthy mix of Cinsault, Counoise, Syrah, Grenache, and Mourvèdre, the wine explodes with peppercorns and violets, crushed rose petal, and that unmistakable delicately fresh aroma of baby powder. Blueberries, and cherries, with raspberry liqueur, and some baked strawberry tarts, too…this is a cornucopia of plentiful Rhône deliciousness – and jam-packed with a bit of California sunshine for good measure. It’s fresh, and precise, with a nimble balance of fruitiness and zippy acidity, and just a killer – KILLER – red to have on hand anytime the BBQ is fired up. Get as much of this as you can…’cause you’re gonna want to be popping this like candy all winter, spring, and summer to come! 

While it lasts!

title: M by Michael Mondavi Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley 2022
body_html:
The FLAGSHIP Napa Cab from Michael Mondavi – which normally retails for $225 at the winery...but not TODAY! The lowest price we can find anywhere in the world is $195.97?! Who’s ready for GLORY?!?!
ONE HUNDRED AND TWENTY SIX DOLLARS OFF! I mean…that’s worth a Huzzah or two, at least! 100% Cabernet Sauvignon, from the Mondavi family’s Animo Estate off Atlas Peak, and their Oso Vineyard off Ink Grade on Howell Mountain. Primo sites, for utterly ELECTRIC, heart-stopping juice…and baddie drives the pace like a Pierce Brown novel. (Where my Howlers at?) Anywho…The 2022 vintage brings on the considerable talents of ROCKSTAR winemaker, Philippe Melka, consulting alongside Robert’s grandson, Rob – who’s led the winemaking here since 2012.

The result? The layered lushness and plentiful plushness you’d expect from Monsieur Philippe – with the imposing power and highly structured framework that these Vaca Mountain sites bring to the table. Full-bodied, unapologetically CLASSIC Napa Cab to its berry-laden core – this is all about sultry red and black currants, with blackberries, and mulberries, followed by plums, and toasted asian spices like star anise and cardamom, plus this supremely decadent polish of molten chocolate, and vanilla bean, with a dusting of mocha powder for good measure. 

This really is a crackerjack Cabernet in the classic, bold, and NOT FOR THE SHY style of the Cult-iest of Cult-y Napa Cabs. Put yourself in the mind of those strong, rock-solid, always-killing-it wines such as Phelps Insignia, Mondavi To Kalon Reserve, Staglin, Forman....or maybe even a little Stag’s Leap Cask 23. Cabernets of structure, depth, power and elegance. This wine is already cruising into its perfect drinking window, and with every swirl of the glass, and every single sip…it just gets better and better! UNDER $100 is an Ocean’s Eleven-worthy heist! It's an ASTONISHING find...but sooooo very little of these....be one of the few on Earth to score a couple at such an EPIC price!

While it lasts!

title: Sleeper Cabernet Franc Napa Valley 2021
body_html:
94 POINTS…a brain-melting 68.8% OFF – Sleeper’s First Ever CABERNET FRANC is back…but OH SO VERY LITTLE REMAINS!!!

If Petit Verdot can step into the spotlight and lead like a Clark Gable – then surely, SURELY Cabernet Franc can, too? The days of Cabernet Franc taking a backseat to its offspring are over – and I could not be more thrilled! The ever mysterious, always blockbusting, consistently industry-disrupting SLEEPER is BACK!!! Our FIRST EVER Cabernet Franc bottling…with 94 POINTS straight out the gate!!! That’s the EXACT same score the same critic gave CHAPPELLET’s cabernet franc – and that stunner consistently makes my Top 3 EVERY dang year! So yeah, I’m pumped… and you should be, too! From the pristine, low-yielding, intensely concentrated, super-duper aromatic 2021 Napa Valley vintage that has already become simply legendary… and I’m here to tell you… the hype is REAL, folks! 

We worked a deal of all-time Last Bottle deals to score this – from a single vineyard at the base of ATLAS PEAK, right on the edge of cool-to-be-hip Coombsville! Organic and biodynamic in practice, but not certified yet…stay tuned. The winery is fiercely secretive – we can’t say much about them, okay, anything really… other than the location of the vineyard it was sourced from – but you are going to want some of this. Trust us. Can’t tell you the winemaker, either…but let’s just say…MARQUEE!

A masterful blend of 89% cabernet franc, with 8% cabernet sauvignon, and 3% petit verdot, aged 18 months in 22% new French oak, this beauty belongs in a class of $125++ Napa cabernet francs, easy! But here?! Today?! Crazy low price UNDER $40?! Huzzah! What a price! Blackberries, black cherries, black raspberries (I swear those are a real thing), plus plums and bay laurel, roasting coffee beans, MAN! Plush, lush, and just PUMPING out bright and boisterous fruit sensations – plums for days, even MORE bramble berries, a touch of graphite, sweet pomegranate molasses, tangy balsamic reduction, then cedar, cinnamon, black cherry cola…YES! This is big and rich, no question, but shining bright and fresh, with a sappy, lingering finish that holds for days! Napa Cab lovers will lose their mind for this, and any Cali-Cab Franc seekers are sure to be driven to a state of sheer ecstasy! If you got this before – you KNOW!!! This might well be your last chance EVER to snag this baby, so…what are you waiting for??? Go get ‘em!!!!

*** And if you’re new to us and wondering what the heck Sleeper even is…here’s our lawyer-approved description... What does a "cult" Napa Valley winery (think: $125 a bottle and up (way up), tiny production, famous winemaker, etc.) do when they make 400 cases of killer Cab but only want to release 200 cases? Well, they quietly call a friend....maybe someone in the wine biz that has been around the block a few times....someone....DISCREET. That’s US. We’re like Fort Knox over here. We created the Sleeper brand specifically to curate these kinds of once-in-a-lifetime type deals that occasionally come our way, and we’re as picky and meticulous on selection as everything else we do. Just ask the thousands of happy people who know! ***

title: Arbuckle Ridge Petit Verdot Ancient Scrolls Paso Robles 2023
body_html:
92 POINTS and ready for its Deville-ian close-up...PETIT VERDOT at an absolutely INSANE price!!!

It’s tiny. It’s inky. It’s a little green (literally.) It’s PETIT VERDOT! A historic blending grape in Bordeaux, adding a bit of BITE to make those bold and beastly beauties pop, pop, POP! Need a little OOMPH in the mid-palate? Petit Verdot. Deep, dark color infusion? Petit Verdot. Floral lift of violets? Petit Verdot. Structure for days? You guessed it…PETIT VERDOT. This little powerhouse grape does soooo many things, but you almost never see it as the stand-alone varietal. The answer is in the name, of course. This “Little Green” variety was always late to ripen in the continental climate of Bordeaux, but now that it has explored the world like a 20-year-old Australian – that’s not really a problem anymore! 

This 92 POINT silky and supple BEAUTY shows what a warmer climate and absolutely pristine growing season can do with the grape. All the floral, and the fruit, all the texture, and saturation, richness, and velvety-ness, without the lockjaw BITE of a junkyard pitbull. This 2023 Arbuckle Ridge pours jet black and glistening, with violets, plums, cocoa powder, and sweet baking spices. On the tongue, it is liquid cashmere, infused with lightly browned butter, and the warm vanilla and cinnamon spice of winter shortbread cookies, plus a little nod to the graphite and volcanic mineral character the grape is prized for in Bordeaux. This is California sunshine at its finest. A deeply layered and viscerally pleasing red, that delivers right here, right now! For ONLY FIFTEEN DOLLARS? It’s a steal!

Arbuckle Ridge is a new project from Scott Saunders, from the very vineyard he grew up in. Planted by his parents in 1992, Scott would sneak out as a teen to watch harvest in the vineyards, and the vibrancy and frenetic energy of harvest crews across Paso Robles inspired him to join up and dive in. Now, years later, we are reaping the rewards – and you KNOW we scored this at the best price in the entire USA! 

Barely enough for an offer…and sure to FLY!!! 

While it lasts!

title: San Filippo Brunello di Montalcino Le Lucére 2020
body_html:
So long, Shiraz…hello, Sangiovese!!! San Filippo’s stunning Le Lucére is BACK! Double 95 POINTS and one of the finest new Montalcino estates in years! 

“San Filippo is home to some of the best boutique Brunello today…” – Robert Parker’s The Wine Advocate

Ok, we’ve used that quote before…but it simply captures everything we are absolutely head-over-heels MAD for with this remarkable Tuscan estate. The critics have spoken on this 2020 – and as tough an act as following up the legendary 2019 vintage is – this deep, powerful, utterly GORGEOUS 2020 is straight up REMARKABLE! “Beautifully balanced and classic” and “intense and super youthful”... the pros have made it clear – this 2020 is a beast AND a beauty! And we have it for a FULL $75 OFF!

Best price anywhere? Yep. Can confirm. And Le Lucére? Their very best plot – at the very heart of Montalcino – close to the iconic Biondi-Santi’s TENUTA GREPPO vineyard, La Serena, and more! The revitalization of this estate in the hands of the always gracious Roberto Gianelli has quickly made this one of the most remarkable estates ANYWHERE! I visited just DAYS after the last fruit from Le Lucére was plucked from the vines, and the 2025 out of tank, midway between wine and juice – just a surreal experience!  22 hectares of stunning Tuscan beauty, just towards the base of Montalcino’s hill, and only a quick jaunt to the top of the old fort. Super consultant and Tuscan LEGEND Paolo Caciorgna guides the winemaking, with the day-to-day under the watchful gaze of rising star, Champagne-born, Tuscan-raised, absolute phenom that is Thomas Bianciardi. For my money (if this was something you could actually bet on…), he’s one of the tippy-top BEST young winemakers in the world today. And this 2020 proves it! 

Do you like roses? And violets? Silky and spicy black cherries, with crushed blackberries, and plenty of minty freshness? OF COURSE YOU DO! This is aromatic, and elegant, and completely knock-you-off-your-feet powerful! Normally $150 – but only HALF that today? This is just now coming around at 5 years in…with easily two decades of utterly happy-making joy, joy, JOY still to come. Crazy low yields, and stressed out vines, and this cracked and inhospitable clayey, schist-y soil that runs down a steeply sloped hill – the vineyard of Le Lucére is far from a paradise. It’s a proving ground – where only the strong survive. Some of the best Brunello you’ll ever taste is the happy result – and we’ve got this newest release at the best price in the world! Seriously – you could fly to Rome, rent a car, drive over 2 hours to Montepulciano, park and walk into the village wine shop…and STILL pay almost $140 for a bottle of this! We pulled a miracle to get this in your hands for such a price – but believe me – this is barely enough for an offer! Last Call, good people, so go get some (or load up again) while this lasts!

title: Casanova di Neri Brunello di Montalcino Tenuta Nuova 2020
body_html:
98 POINT CASANOVA DI NERI – one of Brunello’s BEST, and we’ve scored it for the BEST price in the USA!!!

CASANOVA DI NERI has landed…but for how long?!?! The 2019 of this prized pony sold out in a manner of minutes, and the burgeoning legend that is this ROCKSTAR producer has only grown. 98, double 97s, triple 96s – this is UNIVERSALLY recognized worldwide as a Brunello superstar, and we’ve scored it for a full $71 OFF! There’s some other great prices out there across the country, it must be said – and once this SELLS OUT in a nano-minute, go get those fo’ sho’ – but nobody, I mean, NOBODY tops us in the entire country on this 2020 beauty! 

Can you even call yourself a Brunello lover if you’ve never tasted Neri? Probably not. But the sweetest part is that you don’t even have to be a dyed-in-the-wool Tuscan Raider to worship at the feet of this wine – this will adopt you like Boba Fett and you’ll be a Raider for life! Ok, no more Star Wars fodder…there’s Brunello to consume!

I wasn’t kidding about this being an absolute crowd-pleaser, though. It’s soooo clean, and sooo fresh, with silky, perfectly ripe red fruits like cherries, raspberries, and plums, then juicy blood orange, and accompanying flecks of sandalwood, and lavender, all culminating in this salted pomegranate burst at the last. Crazy good juice – and maybe, just maybe – even better than their 100 point 2019 in my book. But there’s no need for comparison – just consumption! At the BEST IN THE USA price, you simply need to get as much as you can, as fast as you can, and then pop a bottle the second it lands on your doorstep. You’re gonna FLIP!

98 POINTS and one of the TOP Brunellos ANYWHERE! While we got it, good people!

title: Cupano Brunello di Montalcino 2020
body_html:
97 POINTS! The simply GLORIOUS Cupano estate, biodynamically farmed, on a pristine little hamlet just outside of the ancient village of Camigliano – and we’ve got this at the BEST PRICE IN THE USA!

You know I love me a great Brunello – at a great price, of course –  with the sort of scores that my mom could only have dreamed of when I was in school! And…yes…this is 100% THAT. And it is freakin’ delicious, to boot – irregardless of the 97 POINT score and widespread critical praise. But when we tell you the wine business is all about friendships, we MEAN IT. So we’re circling back to my boy, Ema Graetz, who put us in touch with the one and only Andrea Polidoro – a recent “Vinous Icon” – and long-serving winemaker for this remarkable Montalcino estate. Over a sushi dinner in Napa (naturally), Andrea told us how he had been on the press side of the wine biz, rating wines and interviewing vintners from France to Italy, for years. Then, by chance, he tasted Lionel Cousin’s relatively UNKNOWN Cupano wines and fell deeply, madly, in love. He consistently found himself rating them step-in-line with SASSICAIA in blind tastings, which is no easy feat, mind you. So Andrea abandoned his career in Bordeaux and went to work and learn everything he could under Lionel – soaking it all up like a sponge. But HOLD UP…it gets even better!

Now, Lionel was a filmmaker by trade, but that didn’t stop him from learning how to make wine under one of the greatest…Burgundy…winemakers…EVER! The simply LEGENDARY Henri Jayer was Lionel’s family friend, and he mentored him for several years once Lionel and his wife Ornella, bought this stunning little hamlet in Montalcino back in the mid-90s. After making the wines for the first 15 years – and gaining as much respect as a French winemaker in Montalcino could ever hope for – Lionel passed the reins to his understudy Andrea in 2014 – while still keeping a close watch on his progress.

Long-aging (for a minimum of 38 months) in Burgundy barriques (with a little bit of new wood in each vintage) is what really sets this wine apart – you know, on top of the BIODYNAMIC farming, native yeast fermentation, precision winemaking, and careful blending that is fixed firmly as the minimum benchmark in strict accordance with the Henri Jayer philosophy. The wine is aromatically FLAWLESS, with dark, rich, hypnotic notes that range from black cherry kirsch, to new leather, to balsamic roasted herbs, with green tobacco, crushed mint, and smoldering cinnamon…WOWZA! The flavors pick you up like Joey Tribbiani in his prime, pelting you with plums, sour cherries, pulverized raspberries, sweet sage, vanilla, crushed gravel, and zesty blood oranges. It’s powerful, but supremely deft, with a heat that spreads elegantly over a few vigorous moments in the glass. Somehow simultaneously a wine that is unmistakably Brunello, and yet unlike any other Brunello I’ve tasted for some time. It’s everything I want to drink, and all I want to share with my wine friends in this moment…and that includes each and every one of you! Not enough to go ‘round to all y’all, sadly – but for those lucky souls that snag this…be sure to share it with someone special! 

While it lasts!

title: Marchesi Antinori Brunello di Montalcino Pian delle Vigne 2020
body_html:
Another sell out!!!!....Let's keep the Brunello train rolling!!

Pian delle Vigne in da HOUSE!!! The shining, spell-binding, absolutely GORGEOUS 2020 – at the BEST price in the entire USA!!!

Remember all those months ago – when we absolutely CRUSHED a tiny allotment of the 2019 Pian delle Vigne as a back-up offer that disappeared in just MINUTES?!?! No? Welp, no dramas – there’s a good chance only a handful of people saw it on the site…there just simply was not enough to last! Who’s ready for a do-over?!?!

The stunning 94 POINT 2020 vintage…ready to rock your world! One of Italy’s most ICONIC families – and their revered Pian delle Vigne Brunello (don’t confuse it with their Rosso of the same name) is always on the checklist for must-try Brunellos in every vintage!!! This 2020 matched the score of the ICONIC 2019 vintage with one top critic, and Wine Spectator?! They considered this 2020 an UPGRADE…and I gotta say… I’m on board and vibin’ on that call! This 2020 PUMPS like Kelly Slater doing the Huntington Hop – driving forward red raspberries and cherries, with flecks of white pepper, and sandalwood, then hints of cranberry and orange zest, and this sanguine mineral and graphite finish that tightens up like a Chinese finger-trap!
